title: hopea modesta
intro: Hopea modesta is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly known as the small-leafed ironwood tree. The bark of the Hopea modesta plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, the bark of the Hopea modesta is used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions and infusions, which are consumed to alleviate various ailments.
